I see it now. You've got strength.<|21.50|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|1.64|> It was really, really sweet to see a dad say that.<|5.10|> <|5.92|> I loved it.<|7.10|> <|7.88|> But I also know that we
